patch.value: Schema scaffold docs: EXTENSIONS.md, SDK.md, shell completion, help-content examples

Documented --capability schema in docs/EXTENSIONS.md (in-place, line budget preserved at 449) and docs/SDK.md (scaffold capability paragraph + conservative-activation note), added schema examples/tips to package init and extension init in src/cli/help-content.ts, and drift-proofed shell completion by interpolating SCAFFOLD_CAPABILITIES into the zsh/fish --capability lists (completion-command.spec assertion updated). Static-quality and docs-skills gates green.
